calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-191 signal-state discriminability probe: internal functional states produce discriminable output patterns
items.note: Tests whether different internal functional states (wanting, nociception, frustration) produce discriminable signal patterns. Samples z_goal_norm, z_harm_a_norm, z_block_norm from agent's internal state during episodes that induce each functional state. Trains a simple logistic classifier to predict which functional state produced each signal. PASS if classification accuracy >=70% per state and overall >50% (above 3-way chance). Supports MECH-191 (stereotyped signals are causal externalizations) if signals are discriminable by functional state. 3 seeds, 20 episodes per condition per seed, ~150 steps per episode. Proposal EXP-0186 / EVB-0091 from IGW-20260616-196.
